phases.name: Migrate web hosting from Vite /web to Expo web export

steps.name: US-01: Swap deploy target (firebase.json + deploy-web.yml + lockstep web-prod-deploy tests)
steps.criteria: firebase.json hosting.public = 'dist'; deploy-web.yml builds via `npx expo export -p web` at repo root with no /web working-directory steps; web-prod-deploy walking-skeleton.test.ts assertions updated in lockstep to the new pipeline shape.
steps.description: Edit firebase.json to point hosting.public at the repo-root `dist/` path. Edit .github/workflows/deploy-web.yml: replace the two /web build steps (`npm ci`, `npm run build` with working-directory web) with a single step that runs `npx expo export -p web` at repo root. In lockstep, update tests/acceptance/web-prod-deploy/walking-skeleton.test.ts assertions that encode the OLD pipeline shape so they match the NEW shape (public='dist', expo export step instead of /web npm steps). Do NOT delete /web yet — that is 01-02.
steps.scenario_name: US-01: Firebase Hosting serves the Expo web export
acceptance_criteria: expo-web-unify migration.test.ts scenarios 1, 4, 5, 6, 7 (and the invariants 2, 3, 8) GREEN
web-prod-deploy walking-skeleton.test.ts — ALL tests GREEN (updated in-place to reflect new pipeline shape)
deliverables: Updated deploy-web.yml (expo export -p web at repo root)
Updated web-prod-deploy walking-skeleton.test.ts (pipeline shape assertions flipped)

steps.name: US-02: Delete /web directory
steps.criteria: /web directory removed; no production-code references to /web/* remain.
steps.description: Execute `git rm -r web/`. Verify repository-wide there are no residual references to /web paths in production code (`.github/`, `src/`, top-level config files). The main-repo jest config's testPathIgnorePatterns already excludes /web/ so no jest config changes needed; but double-check if the exclusion can be tightened or is still relevant. The `web` npm script in root package.json (`expo start --web`) is DIFFERENT from the /web directory and should NOT be removed.
acceptance_criteria: Root package.json `web` script (`expo start --web`) is PRESERVED

validation.notes: Reviewer dispatch skipped per user autonomy preference. Tight scope (2 steps, ~45 min), derivative of the proven web-prod-deploy pattern. Quality gate is the acceptance test suite.
